section.heading: Laundry and dry cleaning services: procurement from facilities operated by the Navy Resale and Services Support Office

subsection.heading: Authority.—
subsection.content: The Secretary of Defense may authorize an element of the Department of Defense to enter into a contract (through the use of procedures other than competitive procedures) with a laundry and dry cleaning facility operated by the Navy Resale and Services Support Office to procure laundry and dry cleaning services for the armed forces outside the United States.

subsection.heading: Application.—
subsection.content: Subsection (a) shall apply only with respect to a laundry and dry cleaning facility of the Navy Resale and Services Support Office that began operating before October 1, 1989.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 101–189, div. A, title III, § 323(a), Nov. 29, 1989, 103 Stat. 1414.)
